summary: Retention Layer Implementation Testing - All features verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend Playwright: All 7 test scenarios passed. NotificationBell with dropdown (20 notifications), Daily Challenge banner with 'Friendship Story', MySpace with ownership messaging (1 card with remix count), Failed Job Recovery screen working correctly with human-readable messages.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlaps with Daily Challenge banner - minor visual issue

details: NotificationBell visible in GlobalUserBar (top right)
Click notification bell -> dropdown opens
Dropdown shows 20 notification items with correct icons and timestamps
Notification types supported: story_remixed, story_trending, daily_challenge_live, ownership_milestone
GET /api/retention/challenge/today returns today's challenge correctly
POST /api/retention/challenge creates new challenge (admin only)
Non-admin cannot create challenges -> 403
Daily Challenge banner visible on Dashboard with title 'Friendship Story'
Join Challenge CTA button present and navigates to studio
POST /api/retention/remix-stats returns remix counts for given job_ids
MySpace page loads without errors
Found 1 card with ownership messaging (remix count badge)
60 project cards displayed correctly
GET /api/retention/top-stories returns top stories (may be empty if no gallery_opt_in jobs)
Leaderboard section not visible on dashboard (expected - no qualifying stories)
GET /api/retention/email-events returns simulated email events (admin only)
Non-admin cannot access /api/retention/email-events -> 403
Email delivery is MOCKED/simulated - logged to email_events collection, not sent via SMTP
Failed job deep-link opens recovery screen correctly
Human-readable message: 'This video needs attention'
Failure detail: 'The final video assembly did not complete'
Credits refunded message: '21 credits refunded to your account'
Retry Generation button present
Edit Story & Retry button present
Start Fresh button present
No raw enums (FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_RENDER, etc.) visible in UI

critical_code_review_comments: RetentionService properly implements throttled notifications with 30-min aggregation window for story_remixed
Daily challenge system correctly filters by active_date and includes participant count
Remix stats aggregation pipeline correctly groups by parent_job_id
Email service is intentionally MOCKED - logs to email_events collection but does not send actual emails
NotificationBell.js correctly maps notification types to icons (Users, Zap, Target, Trophy)
Dashboard.js correctly fetches and displays daily challenge banner with Join Challenge CTA
MySpace ownership messaging shows remix counts with appropriate badges (Trending for 5+ remixes)
seed_data_creation: Used existing challenge_id=ch_766226ee017e and failed job ID=764f785f-63b2-4cc2-ba5c-1a5f4fd1f907
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retention Layer implementation is complete and working. Key features: (1) NotificationBell in GlobalUserBar with aggregated notifications, (2) Daily Challenge banner on Dashboard with Join Challenge CTA, (3) Ownership messaging on MySpace cards showing remix counts, (4) Mock email service with admin preview panel, (5) Top Stories leaderboard (empty if no gallery_opt_in jobs). P0 regression from iteration_470 still working - failed job recovery screen renders correctly with human-readable messages.

mocked_apis_list: Email delivery is MOCKED/simulated - emails are logged to email_events collection but not sent via SMTP/Resend. This is intentional by design.
